Two Great Northern passenger
trains were tied up at Naples this
morning ION account Of the flooded
district ahead and two others tied
up at Crossport. Four hundred pass
engers are being transferred and COM
PEELED to walk a mile and half
through the swampy ground.


The disastrous floods between Bon
ners Ferry and Troy caused the
wrecking of two engines at LeoE.a,
one mile west OF Boomers Ferry. on
the Great Northern, early this morn
ing. Both overturned. A wrecking
crew with a steam derrick immediate
ly left Kalispell for the scene.


Great Northern trains will prob
ably 30 east over the Northern Pa
cifc tracks tonight.


Last night the Great Northern road
between Boomers Ferry and Troy
again experienced considerable trou-
